sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: [DFAN14A] CEA Industries Inc. SEC Filing
authors: Teresa Marie Goody Guillén Jiajin “Jane” He
feed.summary: YZi Labs Management Ltd., a significant stockholder of CEA Industries Inc. (BNC), has filed a DFAN14A proxy statement, criticizing CEA Industries' governance, internal controls, and the nearly $2 million "golden parachute" for outgoing CEO David Namdar. YZi Labs highlights systemic failures including material weaknesses in financial reporting, related-party transactions benefiting a sitting director, and problematic terms in the CEO's transition agreement. YZi Labs demands transparency and remediation from CEA Industries' Board of Directors regarding these issues.

feed.title: Borr Drilling Stock Edges Up After Acquisition Of 5 Jack-Up Rigs In Mexico For $287M
feed.summary: Borr Drilling announced the acquisition of five premium jack-up rigs in Mexico from Fontis Finance Ltd. for $287 million, with the deal expected to close in Q3 2026. The acquisition will be financed through a $237 million non-recourse seller's credit and cash contributions from Borr Drilling and its local partner. The company's CEO, Bruno Morand, stated that the rigs were acquired at an attractive valuation and are strategically important given the expected increase in demand for jack-up rigs.

feed.title: BITU ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:BITU
feed.summary: The ProShares Ultra Bitcoin ETF (BITU) is a short-term trading tool designed to provide double the daily returns of its underlying Bitcoin index, but its returns can vary significantly if held for longer than a day due to its geared nature and daily resets. The fund, which launched on April 2, 2024, does not invest directly in Bitcoin but uses swap agreements and potentially cash-settled CME Bitcoin futures to gain leveraged exposure. BITU pays monthly dividends with a yield of 30.46% and has assets under management of $417.55 million, growing by 9.93% in the last month.

feed.title: DA Davidson Lifts PT for Citizens Financial (CFG), Keeps Buy Rating
feed.summary: DA Davidson has increased its price target for Citizens Financial (CFG) while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst ongoing analysis of the company's financial performance and market position.

feed.title: LW: JP Morgan Lowers Price Target to $44 on Lamb Weston Hldgs
feed.summary: JP Morgan has lowered its price target for Lamb Weston Holdings (LW) to $44 from $50, while maintaining a Neutral rating. This adjustment reflects a 12% decrease in the price target. Despite this reduction, the average target price from 10 analysts for LW is $54.51, suggesting a potential upside of 31.41% from its current price.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against Sempra (SRE) and Encourages Shareholders to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into Sempra (SRE) following a significant drop in its stock price. The investigation stems from Sempra's reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 financial results, which missed revenue estimates and included lowered 2025 earnings guidance. Shareholders who purchased Sempra securities are encouraged to contact the law firm to learn more about the investigation and their potential claims.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Is Investigating Lockheed Martin Corporation (LMT) And Encourages Investors to Connect
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims on behalf of Lockheed Martin Corporation (LMT) investors who purchased securities prior to January 23, 2024, and continue to hold them. The investigation focuses on whether Lockheed and its officers engaged in corporate wrongdoing. The firm encourages affected investors to connect with them to assist in the investigation at no cost, as they operate on a contingency fee basis.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against Equinix, Inc. (EQIX) and Encourages Investors to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has initiated an investigation into Equinix, Inc. (EQIX) for potential corporate wrongdoing. The firm is encouraging investors who purchased Equinix securities before May 3, 2019, and still hold them, to join the investigation. They operate on a contingency fee basis, aiming to recover investor capital and ensure corporate accountability.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Is Investigating DexCom, Inc. (DXCM) And Encourages Investors to Connect
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims against DexCom, Inc. (DXCM) on behalf of investors who purchased DexCom securities prior to January 8, 2024, and still hold them. The investigation focuses on whether DexCom and its officers/directors engaged in corporate wrongdoing. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm for more information.

feed.title: APO SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Hagens Berman Alerts Apollo Global Management (APO) Investors to Securities Class Action Stemming From "Epstein Files" Revelations
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management (APO) following investigative reports alleging undisclosed ties between CEO Marc Rowan and Jeffrey Epstein. The lawsuit claims that Apollo's prior assurances of "no business" with Epstein were false, leading to a significant drop in stock value and approximately $12 billion in market capitalization loss. Investors who suffered losses during the Class Period (May 10, 2021 – February 21, 2026) are urged to contact the firm by May 1, 2026, to discuss their rights.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. 8-K Filing Details and Registered Securities Listing March 2026
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. has announced the completion of its acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc., as detailed in a recent 8-K filing. The acquisition is expected to enhance Thermo Fisher's presence in digital clinical trial technologies and could be price-sensitive for investors due to potential revenue growth, synergy opportunities, and integration risks. The filing also provides details on Thermo Fisher's registered securities and its use of non-GAAP financial measures.

feed.title: Dollar General Turns to Ahold Delhaize Veteran Fleeman as Next CEO
feed.summary: Dollar General has announced that Jerry “J.J.” Fleeman Jr., previously CEO of Ahold Delhaize USA, will succeed Todd Vasos as CEO, effective January 1, 2027. Vasos will continue as CEO until then and remain on the board, also serving as a senior advisor through April 2, 2027. Fleeman brings over 35 years of experience in grocery retail and a strong track record of leadership and strategic vision.

feed.title: Bit Digital stock slips as bearish technical signals weigh on outlook
feed.summary: Bit Digital Inc. (BTBT) stock has fallen 3.18% to $1.52, trading below its 20-day, 50-day, and 200-day moving averages, indicating persistent bearish pressure. Technical indicators like RSI, Stoch RSI, and CCI signal weakness, with an analyst expecting sideways movement within a $1.48-$1.60 range and a higher probability of further decline. The stock faces critical risk if it breaks below $1.48.

feed.title: The Procter & Gamble Company stock faces pressure amid Dow Jones rotation away from defensive names
feed.summary: The Procter & Gamble Company (P&G) stock is experiencing downward pressure as investors rotate out of defensive consumer staples and into higher-growth sectors. This shift in the Dow Jones Industrial Average reflects improving economic signals and a renewed appetite for risk, challenging P&G's steady but less dynamic performance. Despite P&G's strong fundamentals and defensive moat, the current market dynamics are prompting a re-evaluation of valuation multiples for staples.

feed.title: Delta suspends special treatment for Congress as shutdown sows chaos in airports
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines announced it is temporarily suspending special services for members of Congress due to the ongoing government shutdown impacting air travel resources. The airline cited the difficulty in maintaining its top priority of caring for customers and employees amidst the chaos. This move means lawmakers will no longer receive airport escorts or VIP treatment for services like seat upgrades, though a special phone line for reservations will remain available.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Board And Asia Leadership Shifts Spark Value Questions
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) has appointed Christopher S. Boerner, CEO of Bristol Myers Squibb, to its Board of Directors and Hardik Jhaveri as senior director of marketing for its South Asean hub. These leadership changes are seen as a strategic move towards integrating healthcare expertise and focusing on regional growth in Southeast Asia. For investors, these shifts indicate a potential reorientation of management priorities towards health-oriented product development and brand building in high-growth markets, while the stock currently trades below analyst targets and its estimated fair value.

feed.title: CVS Health MinuteClinic Services Expand Access to Affordable Primary Care Across US in 2026
feed.summary: CVS Health's MinuteClinic network is expanding its reach, now with over 1,000 locations nationwide, to offer accessible and affordable primary care services. This expansion addresses the rising costs of healthcare and provider shortages, making essential health services available without appointments and contributing to CVS Health's growth in the integrated care market. The company plans further expansion with 200 new MinuteClinics by 2027 and is leveraging technology and partnerships to enhance its offerings and market position.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment launches Aristocrat Gaming online slots in West Virginia
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment has introduced Aristocrat Gaming's online slot titles in West Virginia, becoming the first online casino operator to do so. The games are available on Caesars iCasino, Caesars Sports, and Horseshoe Online Casino platforms. This strategic move aims to enhance Caesars Entertainment's position in the online gambling market and expand its digital offerings within West Virginia, leveraging exclusive gaming content to attract new users and boost engagement.

feed.title: After Blowout Earnings, How Much Higher Can Micron Go?
feed.summary: Micron Technology (MU) has seen its stock soar over 553% since April 2025 and 34% year-to-date in 2026, driven by strong demand for AI memory solutions. The company reported blowout Q2 2026 earnings with massive revenue and EPS growth, and its Q3 revenue guidance surpasses full-year revenue for all years prior to fiscal 2024. Analysts remain bullish, with a consensus "Buy" rating and a potential 12% upside from current prices, indicating continued growth prospects powered by the AI revolution.

feed.title: FS KKR stock slides as Moody’s downgrade flags rising credit stress
feed.summary: Shares of FS KKR Capital Corp (FSK) have fallen sharply after Moody’s downgraded the private credit fund to junk status, reflecting concerns about deteriorating asset quality and weak earnings. The stock has dropped over 31% this year due to rising non-accrual loans and broader stress in the private credit sector. This downgrade, driven by high leverage and exposure to payment-in-kind loans, also highlights a wider strain on the rapidly growing private credit market.

feed.title: Progressive Corp stock dips after $1.5 billion senior notes pricing amid insurance sector yield pres
feed.summary: Progressive Corp has priced $1.5 billion in senior notes, consisting of $500 million at 4.60% due 2031 and $1 billion at 5.15% due 2036. This move is part of the insurer's capital management strategy in a competitive P&C market, with the stock closing down 0.44% on the NYSE following the announcement. Analysts view the debt raise as a disciplined approach to navigating a volatile claims environment while maintaining strong balance sheet flexibility.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. Class A stock slides 1.5% amid U.S.-Iran tensions and soaring AI capex concerns
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Class A stock fell over 1.5% due to heightened U.S.-Iran tensions, which are driving up oil prices and increasing concerns about energy costs for AI data centers. Investors are also scrutinizing Alphabet's massive $175-185 billion capital expenditure guidance for 2026, which is nearly double the previous year's, sparking fears of compressed margins despite strong revenue growth in Q4. Analyst sentiment remains largely bullish, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and price targets suggesting upside, but regulatory risks and intense competition in AI and ad tech persist.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley says Wall Street’s crypto push isn’t about FOMO
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's head of digital assets, Amy Oldenburg, clarified that Wall Street's increasing involvement in crypto is not driven by fear of missing out (FOMO) but rather by years of strategic infrastructure development. The bank plans to expand its digital asset strategy to include supporting tokenized equities on its alternative trading system by the second half of 2026. Oldenburg emphasized the ongoing challenges of modernizing decades-old banking systems and fostering global financial network coordination.

feed.title: BioAtla (NASDAQ: BCAB) approves merger, 1-for-50 reverse split and 2026 executive retention bonuses
feed.summary: BioAtla (NASDAQ: BCAB) stockholders have approved an internal merger with its wholly-owned subsidiary, BA Merger Sub, Inc., which will include a 1-for-50 reverse stock split. Additionally, the company's board has approved 2026 cash retention bonuses for key executives, including the CFO, CMO, and CEO, tied to specific financial and capital-raising milestones, replacing a regular bonus plan and salary increases. This decision comes after no bonuses were earned in 2025 due to unmet financial and business objectives.

feed.title: Research Alert: CFRA Maintains Hold Rating On Shares Of Avantor
feed.summary: This article is a research alert indicating that CFRA has maintained a Hold rating on shares of Avantor. No additional details are available in the provided content.

feed.title: iShares J.P. Morgan Broad USD Emerging Markets Bond ETF (BATS:BEMB) Stock Price Up 0.6% – Here’s Why
feed.summary: Shares of iShares J.P. Morgan Broad USD Emerging Markets Bond ETF (BATS:BEMB) rose by 0.6% during Monday's trading, closing at $52.69. The ETF saw significantly decreased trading volume, with only 513 shares changing hands compared to its average daily volume of 2,284 shares. This ETF invests in US-dollar-denominated sovereign, quasi-sovereign, and corporate debt from emerging markets.

feed.title: GE HealthCare Wins FDA 510(k) Clearance for Photonova Spectra PCCT
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has obtained FDA 510(k) clearance for its Photonova Spectra PCCT system, a significant advancement in diagnostic imaging. This system utilizes Deep Silicon detectors for superior resolution and tissue differentiation, aiming to enhance clinical insights and workflow efficiency. The company plans a commercial rollout in the U.S. following regulatory approval, reinforcing its leadership in innovative imaging technologies.

feed.title: EQT Initiated with 'Buy' Rating by Truist Securities Analyst Gab
feed.summary: Truist Securities has initiated coverage on EQT, an independent natural gas production company, with a 'Buy' rating and a price target of $74.00 USD. This new rating follows other recent analyst activities, including maintained 'Overweight' ratings from JP Morgan and Barclays, and a 'Buy' rating from UBS. The overall consensus from 28 brokerage firms rates EQT with an "Outperform" status.

feed.title: Carnival Stock Cut by Barclays and Truist, but This Wall Street Pro Still Sees Upside
feed.summary: Barclays and Truist have adjusted their price targets for Carnival Corporation (CCL) ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report on March 27, with Barclays maintaining an "Overweight" rating despite a slight target trim, and Truist reiterating a "Hold" with a more significant cut. The divergence highlights a debate between Barclays' view that fuel price-related selloffs are buying opportunities and Truist's concern about moderating net yield growth and geopolitical risks. The article details Carnival's strong operational performance in 2025 and guidance for 2026, alongside challenges like unhedged fuel costs and a $26.6 billion debt load, and suggests key points to watch in the upcoming earnings report.

feed.title: Dow Inc. stock in focus ahead of Q1 earnings and strategic shifts in chemicals sector
feed.summary: Dow Inc. is attracting investor attention leading up to its Q1 earnings release, with a focus on its ability to manage feedstock costs, navigate global demand, and implement strategic portfolio adjustments. The company's strong position in North American ethylene production and its packaging and specialty plastics segment are key drivers. Risks include volatile commodity prices and a potential slowdown in China, but Dow's commitment to sustainability and its advantageous cost structure from US shale gas are expected to provide long-term tailwinds.

feed.title: Global Beauty Brand Nopalera Raises $4M in Funding Led by Morgan Stanley, Co-Led by L'ATTITUDE Ventures
feed.summary: Nopalera, a San Antonio-based premium beauty and lifestyle brand founded by Sandra Velasquez, has successfully closed a $4 million funding round. The investment was led by Morgan Stanley's Next Level Fund and co-led by L'ATTITUDE Ventures, with additional support from a number of other investors. This funding will enable Nopalera to expand its retail presence and product offerings, furthering its mission to redefine the representation of Latino culture in the global beauty industry.

feed.title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences is set to acquire Ouro Medicines for nearly $1.7 billion, gaining OM336 (gamgertamig), a bispecific antibody targeting BCMA and CD3 for autoimmune diseases. This acquisition expands Gilead's inflammation pipeline, building on previous investments in the field. Gilead will also partner with Galapagos to develop OM336, retaining most commercialization rights.

feed.title: Costco Membership Renewal Promotion Offers New Members Up to $45 Digital Shop Card in 2026
feed.summary: Costco is offering new Gold Star and Executive members a digital shop card as an incentive to sign up for auto-renewal with a Visa card. This promotion, which provides up to a $45 shop card, aims to attract new members and reinforce the value of Costco's membership model amidst retail competition. The initiative highlights Costco's strategy to maintain its stable subscription-like revenue stream and strong member loyalty.

feed.title: Microsoft and Nvidia team up on AI nuclear push
feed.summary: Microsoft and Nvidia have launched a new "AI for nuclear" initiative to accelerate the construction of nuclear power plants. The collaboration aims to streamline permitting, design, and operations using AI tools, addressing the significant energy demands of AI technology. This partnership seeks to move nuclear development towards more repeatable, reference-based delivery while maintaining high regulatory and engineering standards.

feed.title: FT Vest Laddered Deep Buffer ETF (BATS:BUFD) Trading Up 0.7% – Time to Buy?
feed.summary: FT Vest Laddered Deep Buffer ETF (BUFD) saw its share price increase by 0.7% on Monday, with trading volume doubling its daily average. The fund, which has a market capitalization of $1.40 billion, experienced significant investment activity from institutional investors like Wedbush Securities Inc. and Royal Bank of Canada, who increased their stakes. BUFD is an actively managed fund-of-funds investing in a laddered portfolio of FT Cboe Vest U.S. Equity Deep Buffer ETFs.

feed.title: Pizza Expo 2026: Hormel Foods presents top 5 pizza trends
feed.summary: Hormel Foods has identified five key pizza trends for 2026, coinciding with the International Pizza Expo in Las Vegas. These trends include a move towards more specialized spice like Calabrian chili, the rise of brisket as a premium protein, an increased demand for "Triple Pepperoni" and other meat-forward pies, and global flavor influences such as Indian-inspired toppings. Additionally, specialty crust innovations like sourdough and low-carb options are gaining popularity.

feed.title: FS KKR stock slides as Moody’s downgrade flags rising credit stress
feed.summary: FS KKR Capital Corp's stock has dropped over 31% this year after Moody’s downgraded the private credit fund to junk status, citing deteriorating asset quality and weak earnings. The downgrade was driven by a sharp rise in non-accrual loans (5.5% of total investments) and FSKK's higher leverage and exposure to payment-in-kind loans compared to peers. This event highlights broader stress in the private credit market, with increased redemption requests from investors amid concerns over potential loan losses.

feed.title: Applied Materials, Inc. stock faces uncertainty amid semiconductor sector slowdown as of March 2026
feed.summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (ISIN: US0382221051) is facing uncertainty in the semiconductor sector as of March 2026, with investors closely watching for AI-driven demand signals amidst a maturing chip cycle. The company, a leader in semiconductor manufacturing equipment, provides critical tools for wafer fabrication, essential for advanced chips used in AI, smartphones, and data centers. Despite benefitting from the AI boom, the sector shows signs of normalization, with potential inventory corrections and geopolitical tensions posing risks, although the company's technological edge and focus on next-gen chip production offer long-term growth prospects.

feed.title: Hellfire Missile Launcher Tucked Inside A Container Rolled Out By Lockheed
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin has unveiled the "Grizzly," a Hellfire missile launcher discreetly housed within a 10-foot shipping container. This system offers a flexible, low-cost solution for enhancing air defenses against threats like drones, and for targeting capabilities, with the added benefit of being able to hide in plain sight. The Grizzly has successfully completed two live-fire tests and is designed for rapid deployment, remote operation, and potential integration with various missile types beyond Hellfire.

feed.title: Aditya Birla Group, TOI Group, Bolt Ventures & Blackstone acquire RCB for $1.78 billion
feed.summary: A consortium comprising Aditya Birla Group, The Times of India Group, Bolt Ventures, and Blackstone has acquired 100% of the Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) franchise, including both men's and women's teams, for $1.78 billion. This acquisition, pending BCCI approval, marks a significant investment in the IPL and WPL. Aryaman Vikram Birla will serve as chairman and Satyan Gajwani as vice-chairman, aiming to further build RCB into a global sporting institution.

feed.title: Dollar Tree class action claims retailer printed too many credit card digits on receipts
feed.summary: A class action lawsuit has been filed against Dollar Tree Inc., alleging that the retailer violated the Fair and Accurate Credit Transactions Act (FACTA) by printing more than the last five digits of credit and debit card numbers on customer receipts. Plaintiff Marilena Murphy claims this practice exposes customers to an elevated risk of identity theft and seeks to represent a class of individuals affected by this alleged unlawful conduct. The lawsuit demands a jury trial and is requesting statutory and punitive damages.

feed.title: Oracle Launches Tools to Help Enterprises Deploy AI Agents
feed.summary: Oracle has unveiled new and updated features aimed at helping enterprises deploy artificial intelligence agents. This includes 22 new Fusion Agentic Applications embedded in Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications, an updated Oracle AI Agent Studio with new building and orchestration capabilities, and new agentic AI innovations for Oracle AI Database. These offerings enable AI agents to reason, act across business systems, and securely access real-time enterprise data for business insights.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Gartner, Inc. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) and certain officers, alleging federal securities law violations. The lawsuit claims that Gartner made false and misleading statements and failed to disclose adverse facts regarding its contract value growth, projected revenues, and consulting segment performance between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to join the case, with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 18, 2026.

feed.title: RBC (RBMCF) launches Palantir-linked auto-callable notes with 11.85% coupon
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) has launched Auto-Callable Fixed Coupon Barrier Notes linked to Palantir Technologies Inc. Class A common stock, offering an annualized coupon of 11.85%. These notes pay a monthly fixed coupon and may be automatically called quarterly if Palantir's stock closes at or above its initial value. If not called, maturity payments are contingent on Palantir's stock performance relative to a 50% barrier, otherwise investors receive Palantir shares, exposing them to potential principal loss below the barrier.

feed.title: AeroVironment unveils laser defense system as shares slip (AVAV:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: AeroVironment (AVAV) introduced a new high-energy laser weapon system designed to counteract drones and other unmanned aerial threats. Despite this product unveiling, the company's shares experienced a 2.3% drop during midday trading. The announcement comes as the broader S&P 500 remained relatively stable.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Increases Sunoco (NYSE:SUN) Price Target to $73.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Sunoco (NYSE:SUN) from $66.00 to $73.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment suggests a potential upside of nearly 10% from the previous closing price despite Sunoco missing quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, although revenue increased significantly year-over-year. The consensus among analysts for Sunoco is currently a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $67.83, while the stock traded up 2.2% following the news.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Shareholders
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is alerting investors of the upcoming April 20, 2026 deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL). The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made materially false and misleading statements between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026, regarding its business execution and competition, leading to significant stock price drops after a surprise CEO change and disappointing financial results. Investors who suffered losses are urged to contact the firm to learn more about pursuing claims under federal securities laws.

feed.title: Expedia vs. Booking Holdings: Which Travel Stock Is a Stronger Pick?
feed.summary: This article compares Expedia (EXPE) and Booking Holdings (BKNG), two major online travel agencies, to determine which stock offers better investment potential. It highlights Expedia's stronger momentum, rising bookings, and more attractive valuation compared to Booking Holdings, despite both benefiting from the strong global travel market. Expedia's diversified model, B2B growth, and AI integration are cited as key strengths, leading to its recommendation as the preferred pick.

feed.title: Does Johnson & Johnson Stock Have More Upside?
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) stock shows strong momentum due to accelerating growth in its high-margin Innovative Medicine portfolio, particularly from drugs like Darzalex, Carvykti, and Tremfya. While the company faces a significant revenue headwind from Stelara biosimilar erosion and litigation concerns, its strong fundamentals, including robust operating cash flow and a deep pipeline, suggest potential for further upside. The article analyzes both bull and bear perspectives on JNJ's future growth and profitability.

feed.title: Devon Energy (DVN) Receives 'Buy' Rating Initiation from Truist Securities | DVN Stock News
feed.summary: Truist Securities has initiated coverage on Devon Energy (DVN) with a 'Buy' rating and set a price target of $63.00, announced by analyst Gabe Daoud on March 24, 2026. This positive outlook follows several other recent analyst upgrades and price target increases for DVN from firms like TD Cowen, Mizuho, Barclays, Piper Sandler, and UBS. Devon Energy, a major oil and gas producer with significant acreage in top US shale plays, reported net proved reserves of 2.4 billion barrels of oil equivalent in 2025 and 840,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day in net production.
